name: Tokyotokeiba Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tokyotokeiba Co.,Ltd. engages in the rental of horse racing facilities in Japan. It is involved in the rental of auto racetracks; management of an amusement park; and rental of warehouse facilities, as well as commercial facilities. The company also provides construction management services; and maintenance services for air conditioning equipment, as well as manages and operates shopping mall and office building. In addition, it operates restaurants and parking lots. Tokyotokeiba Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
